name: Chicken Sate with Peanut Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients for the marinade in a bowl.
2. Add chicken pieces to the marinade and let them sit for at least 30 minutes or up to several hours in the refrigerator.
3. Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers.
4. Grill the skewers over medium-high heat until the chicken is cooked through, about 6-8 minutes per side.
5. Serve the grilled chicken sate with the peanut sauce on the side.
